scanForm.badge: Real scans. Real results. Zero simulation.
scanForm.intro: Enter a URL, domain, IP, or API endpoint. Choose a scan depth — everything runs in the browser + this app; no sign-up or database.
scanForm.presetQuickFeatures: headers, TLS, ports, SPF/DMARC, robots & security.txt, takeover.
scanForm.presetCompleteFeatures: adds source crawl, subdomains, VirusTotal, wp-cron, Google dork, AI summary.
scanForm.apiKeySummary: Shared host: API key for Argus routes (optional)
scanForm.apiKeyHelpMid: , paste the same value here. It is stored in this browser only and sent as

featureCards.aiDesc: Domain intel; Gemini summary when configured (Complete)
